skills.name: skill-creator
skills.description: Create new skills, modify and improve existing skills, and measure skill performance with iterative eval loops.
skills.author: lordqyxz
skills.trigger: Use when users want to create a skill from scratch, update or optimize an existing skill, run evals to test a skill, benchmark skill performance with variance analysis, or optimize a skill's description for better triggering accuracy.

skills.name: python-code
skills.description: Write, refactor, and debug Python code following Pythonic best practices from the official Python style guide, Effective Python, and Fluent Python.
skills.author: lordqyxz
skills.trigger: Use this skill whenever the user writes, reviews, refactors, or debugs Python code, asks about Python patterns, idioms, or style, mentions writing a script/module/package in Python, or requests code that is Pythonic. Applies to all Python 3.10+ code.
